test-case.description: Should process arguments without error
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should process arguments without error

test-case.description: Should work correctly when used with full path name
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should work correctly when used with full path name

test-case.description: Should invoke correct path when used with FilePath argument
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should invoke correct path when used with FilePath argument

test-case.description: Should invoke correct path when used with Path alias argument
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should invoke correct path when used with Path alias argument

test-case.description: Should wait for command completion if used with Wait argument
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should wait for command completion if used with Wait argument

test-case.description: Should work correctly with WorkingDirectory argument
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should work correctly with WorkingDirectory argument

test-case.description: Should work correctly within an unspecified WorkingDirectory with wildcard-type characters
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should work correctly within an unspecified WorkingDirectory with wildcard-type characters

test-case.description: Should handle stderr redirection without error
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should handle stderr redirection without error

test-case.description: Should handle stdout redirection without error
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should handle stdout redirection without error

test-case.description: Should handle stdin redirection without error
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should handle stdin redirection without error

test-case.description: Should give an error when -Verb parameter is used
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should give an error when -Verb parameter is used

test-case.description: Should give an error when -WindowStyle parameter is used
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should give an error when -WindowStyle parameter is used

test-case.description: Should give an error when both -NoNewWindow and -WindowStyle are specified
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should give an error when both -NoNewWindow and -WindowStyle are specified

test-case.description: ExitCode returns with -NoNewWindow, -PassThru and -Wait
test-case.name: Start-Process.ExitCode returns with -NoNewWindow, -PassThru and -Wait

test-case.description: Should start cmd.exe with Verb 'open' and WindowStyle 'Minimized'
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should start cmd.exe with Verb 'open' and WindowStyle 'Minimized'

test-case.description: Should start notepad.exe with ShellExecute
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should start notepad.exe with ShellExecute

test-case.description: Should be able to use the -WhatIf switch without performing the actual action
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should be able to use the -WhatIf switch without performing the actual action

test-case.description: Should return null when using -WhatIf switch with -PassThru
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should return null when using -WhatIf switch with -PassThru

test-case.description: Should run without errors when -ArgumentList is $null
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should run without errors when -ArgumentList is $null

test-case.description: Should run without errors when -ArgumentList is @()
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should run without errors when -ArgumentList is @()

test-case.description: Should run without errors when -ArgumentList is ''
test-case.name: Start-Process.Should run without errors when -ArgumentList is ''

test-case.description: Should open the application that is associated a file
test-case.name: Start-Process tests requiring admin.Should open the application that is associated a file

test-case.description: UseNewEnvironment parameter should reset environment variables for child process
test-case.name: Environment Tests.UseNewEnvironment parameter should reset environment variables for child process

test-case.description: -Environment adds or replaces environment variables to child process
test-case.name: Environment Tests.-Environment adds or replaces environment variables to child process

test-case.description: -Environment can remove an environment variable from child process
test-case.name: Environment Tests.-Environment can remove an environment variable from child process

test-case.description: Error redirection along with '-NoNewWindow' should work for Start-Process
test-case.name: Bug fixes.Error redirection along with '-NoNewWindow' should work for Start-Process
